meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Freelancer Guide: Antigravity Template for Version Control
content.seo_description: Master version control as a freelancer. Learn how to use the Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship professional, scalable SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: Stop manually tracking code states. The Antigravity project template enforces strict versioning by containerizing your codebase logic. By integrating Claude Code, you automate commit history and branch management, ensuring your client projects remain audit-ready, roll-back safe, and production-grade without the overhead of traditional Git-heavy workflows.
content.intro:
You are staring at a folder named 'project_final_v3_REAL_final'. Your client just asked for a feature revert, and you realize your lack of a robust versioning strategy has turned your livelihood into a high-stakes guessing game. The friction of manual backups isn't just annoying; it’s a direct threat to your reputation as a professional builder.

The solution isn't more discipline—it's better architecture. By adopting the Antigravity project template, you treat your codebase as an immutable, versioned artifact. Combined with Claude Code, you transform your development environment into an autonomous engine that handles state tracking, so you can focus on shipping features that actually move the needle for your clients.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root architecture that forces structure before a single line of business logic is written.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project using the Antigravity standard template with strict versioning manifest support.

steps.title: Configure Automated Snapshot Hooks
steps.description: Bind your development environment to triggers that capture the state of your project on every major feature completion.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the antigravity.yaml file to enable automatic state snapshots on every successful feature commit.

steps.title: Implement Semantic Versioning Logic
steps.description: Map your project growth to semantic versioning to ensure clients always know the stability level of the delivered build.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up the versioning schema in the project root to auto-increment on production deployments.

steps.title: Establish the 'Golden Build' Branching Pattern
steps.description: Create a rigid workflow where the 'main' branch remains pristine and all development happens in ephemeral, traceable environments.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branching policy that enforces Antigravity validation on all pull requests before merging to production.

steps.title: Automate Client-Ready Documentation
steps.description: Generate changelogs automatically from your versioned snapshots to provide instant, professional transparency to clients.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a markdown changelog based on the history of Antigravity snapshots for the current project version.

pro_tips: Use Antigravity’s 'shadow-state' feature to test experimental features in an isolated environment without bloating your main branch.
Always set your Claude Code context to 'concise mode' when running versioning scripts to keep your terminal output clean for client screen-shares.
Create a 'rollback-ready' alias in your shell that triggers the last stable Antigravity snapshot in under 3 seconds.
Use the '--audit' flag in Claude Code to analyze your code for potential dependency conflicts before performing a major version bump.
Treat your configuration files as the source of truth; never manually edit the state logs—let the Antigravity engine handle the serialization.
content.next_steps: Once your environment is stabilized, deploy your first versioned artifact to a staging environment and run a mock rollback to verify your disaster recovery workflow.
content.conversion_block: Stop treating your code as a disposable file dump and start building like a senior engineer who values their time and their client's trust. The infrastructure you build today dictates the scale of your business tomorrow. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
